name: Charitable Gift Tax Deduction

eligibility.description: Gifts must be made to organizations meeting 501(c)(3) or similar criteria; specific rules apply to partial interests like CRTs or CLTs.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Provides an unlimited deduction for the value of gifts made to qualified religious, charitable, scientific, or educational organizations, effectively removing these assets from the taxable gift base.
